svg.title: Enhanced SD-05 Asset Request Bot — Full System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing 7 system layers: Telegram interface, NLP engine, slot filling, PDF rulebook ingestion, HRIS validation, decision engine, and SQLite persistence, with suspicion detection running across all layers.

g.text: Intent detection · entity extraction · paraphrase normalisation
Typo tolerance · ambiguity resolution · multi-language support
Suspicious Request Detector (runs on every message)
Velocity checks · after-hours spike · model mismatch for grade · bulk pattern
Prompt injection shield · session anomaly scoring · admin alert on high score
